prose.en: Implement cryptographic mechanisms to authenticate the following software or firmware components prior to installation: {param:si-07.15_odp}.

guidance.en: Cryptographic authentication includes verifying that software or firmware components have been digitally signed using certificates recognized and approved by organizations. Code signing is an effective method to protect against malicious code. Organizations that employ cryptographic mechanisms also consider cryptographic key management solutions.

prose.en: cryptographic mechanisms are implemented to authenticate {param:si-07.15_odp} prior to installation.

objects.en: procedures addressing software, firmware, and information integrity
system configuration settings and associated documentation
Organizational personnel responsible for software, firmware, and/or information integrity
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Cryptographic mechanisms authenticating software and firmware prior to installation

guidelines.en: software or firmware components to be authenticated by cryptographic mechanisms prior to installation are defined;
